raw_response:
```python
allowed = {"00", "11"}
observed = set(counts.keys())

assert observed.issubset(allowed), f"Unexpected outcomes for Bell state: {counts}"
assert sum(counts.values()) == shots, f"Counts do not sum to shots: {counts} vs shots={shots}"

c00 = counts.get("00", 0)
c11 = counts.get("11", 0)

assert c00 > 0 and c11 > 0, f"Expected both Bell outcomes 00 and 11 to appear: {counts}"

imbalance = abs(c00 - c11) / shots
assert imbalance <= 0.2, f"Bell outcomes are not approximately balanced: 00={c00}, 11={c11}, shots={shots}"
```

```python
allowed = {"00", "11"}

c00 = counts.get("00", 0)
```

```python
allowed = {"00", "11"}
observed = set(counts.keys())

assert observed <= allowed, f"Unexpected outcomes for Bell state: {observed - allowed}"

c00 = counts.get("00", 0)
c11 = counts.get("11", 0)

assert c00 + c11 == shots, f"Counts do not sum to shots using only Bell outcomes: {c00 + c11} != {shots}"
assert c00 > 0 and c11 > 0, f"Both Bell outcomes should appear, got counts={counts}"

imbalance = abs(c00 - c11) / shots if shots else 0.0
```
```python
assert imbalance <= 0.2, f"Bell outcomes are not approximately balanced: 00={c00}, 11={c11}, shots={shots}"
```

```python
allowed = {"00", "11"}
observed = set(counts.keys())
assert observed <= allowed, f"Unexpected outcomes for Bell state: {observed - allowed}"

c00 = counts.get("00", 0)
c11 = counts.get("11", 0)
assert c00 + c11 == shots, f"Counts do not sum to shots with only Bell outcomes: {c00 + c11} != {shots}"

diff = abs(c00 - c11)
tolerance = metadata.get("balance_tolerance", max(1, int(0.2 * shots))) if isinstance(metadata, dict) else max(1, int(0.2 * shots))
assert diff <= tolerance, f"Bell outcomes are not approximately balanced: 00={c00}, 11={c11}, diff={diff}, tol={tolerance}"
```

```python
allowed = {"00", "11"}
observed = set(counts.keys())
assert observed <= allowed, f"Unexpected outcomes for Bell state: {counts}"

c00 = counts.get("00", 0)
c11 = counts.get("11", 0)
total = sum(counts.values())

expected_shots = metadata.get("shots", shots) if isinstance(metadata, dict) else shots
assert total == expected_shots, f"Total counts {total} != shots {expected_shots}"
assert c00 + c11 == total, f"Non-Bell outcomes present: {counts}"
assert c00 > 0 and c11 > 0, f"Both Bell outcomes should appear: {counts}"

imbalance = abs(c00 - c11) / total
assert imbalance < 0.2, f"Bell outcomes not approximately balanced: 00={c00}, 11={c11}"
```

```python
allowed = {"00", "11"}
observed = set(counts.keys())

assert observed <= allowed, f"Unexpected outcomes for Bell state: {counts}"
assert counts.get("00", 0) > 0, f"Missing '00' outcome: {counts}"
assert counts.get("11", 0) > 0, f"Missing '11' outcome: {counts}"

c00 = counts.get("00", 0)
c11 = counts.get("11", 0)
total_allowed = c00 + c11

assert total_allowed == shots, f"Counts do not sum to shots using only Bell outcomes: counts={counts}, shots={shots}"

imbalance = abs(c00 - c11) / shots
assert imbalance <= 0.2, f"'00' and '11' are not approximately balanced: 00={c00}, 11={c11}, shots={shots}"
```
